name: Together After Dark
short_description: Together After Dark is a co-op horror psychological game with a survival touch for 1-4 players. 4 Teens are stuck in the forest and need to find a way out but they are not alone
detailed_description:
Together After Dark is a 4-player co-op horror experience that will take you on chilling journey into the unknown together with your friends. Dive deep into a dark and dangerous forest filled with unsettling mysteries, malevolent energies.

Immerse yourselves in the chilling atmosphere:


Walk through treacherous paths all covered in darkness and every rustle of the leaves or snap of a twig will feed your fear.
Witness spooky paranormal events that will make you doubt your mind.
Enjoy the excitement of camaraderie as you depend on one another to prevail over what lies ahead in terms of challenges and horrors.


Beyond the haunting atmosphere and chilling encounters lies a crucial task: It is necessary to find a way out without being seen.

Together After Dark provides a memorable tour of horror enthusiasts who are looking for an exciting and bloody journey with their friends.

Key Features:

  • 4-player co-op horror experience

  • Hauntingly beautiful and atmospheric environment

  • Chilling paranormal encounters and jump scares

  • Challenging

  • Unravel the dark secrets hidden within the forest

Are you brave enough to face the darkness?

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
